nodes.title: Integrated Math 3
nodes.description: Students develop a deep understanding of quadratic relationships, multiple solution methods, and extend solutions into the complex number system. Emphasis is placed on connecting algebraic procedures with graphical meaning.

nodes.title: Graphing Quadratic Functions
nodes.description: Students analyze vertex form, standard form, and intercept form. Focus on transformations (translations, reflections, stretches) and identifying key features (vertex, axis of symmetry, intercepts).

nodes.title: Solving Quadratic Equations by Graphing
nodes.description: Students interpret x-intercepts as solutions and connect graphical solutions to real-world contexts.

nodes.title: Complex Numbers
nodes.description: Introduction to imaginary unit i, operations with complex numbers, and understanding why non-real solutions occur.

nodes.title: Solve Quadratic Equations by Factoring
nodes.description: Students factor trinomials and apply the zero product property.

nodes.title: Solving Quadratic Equations by Completing the Square
nodes.description: Conceptual development of completing the square, linking to vertex form.

nodes.title: Using the Quadratic Formula and the Discriminant
nodes.description: Derivation (conceptual) and application; interpreting discriminant for number/type of solutions.

nodes.title: Quadratic Inequalities
nodes.description: Graphing solution regions and interpreting intervals.

nodes.title: Solving Linear-Nonlinear Systems
nodes.description: Solving systems graphically and algebraically; interpreting intersections.

nodes.title: Quadratic Functions and Complex Numbers
nodes.description: Students develop a deep understanding of quadratic relationships, multiple solution methods, and extend solutions into the complex number system. Emphasis is placed on connecting algebraic procedures with graphical meaning.

nodes.title: average_rate_of_change
nodes.description: Must support equation, table, and graph-estimation inputs.

nodes.title: completing_square_solve
nodes.description: Solve quadratics with rational, irrational, and complex solutions.

nodes.title: complex_number_operations
nodes.description: Includes equating complex numbers, add/subtract, multiply, and divide.

nodes.title: discriminant_analysis
nodes.description: Compute and classify solution type before solving.

nodes.title: imaginary_number_simplification
nodes.description: Covers sqrt(-n), products of pure imaginaries, and equations with pure imaginary solutions.

nodes.title: linear_quadratic_system
nodes.description: Supports substitution, elimination, graphing, and intersection interpretation.

nodes.title: quadratic_factoring
nodes.description: Includes GCF, trinomial factoring, a != 1, and Zero Product Property.

nodes.title: quadratic_formula
nodes.description: Routine, non-factorable, and imaginary-solution cases.

nodes.title: quadratic_graph_analysis
nodes.description: Covers graphing from table, equation, comparison, and context. Aligns with graph_analysis and plot_from_equation.

nodes.title: quadratic_inequality_graphing
nodes.description: Boundary type, test point, and shading region.

nodes.title: quadratic_inequality_interval_solution
nodes.description: One-variable inequality solution sets and contextual interpretation.

nodes.title: quadratic_quadratic_system
nodes.description: Solves and interprets systems of two quadratic equations.

nodes.title: quadratic_vertex_form_completion
nodes.description: Convert to vertex form and interpret graph features.

nodes.title: solve_quadratic_by_graphing
nodes.description: Includes exact roots, estimated roots, table/calculator support, and contextual root interpretation.

nodes.title: special_product_factoring
nodes.description: Difference of squares, perfect square trinomials, and complex-solution extension.
